description: Triggers when user wants to generate UI designs from text prompts using Google Stitch MCP, or convert Stitch output to Tailwind/shadcn
should_trigger: Generate a hero section UI using Google Stitch
Use Stitch MCP to create a pricing section
Create a landing page design with Stitch from a text prompt
Convert the Stitch HTML/CSS output to Tailwind classes
Generate a contact form design with Stitch
Use Stitch as an alternative to Figma for UI generation
should_not_trigger: Design in Figma and export to code
